prompt: We inherited a folder containing three apps and a shared package. Trace the real Git roots, launch commands, API ownership, and reusable components into a durable navigation note without assessing defects.
Our onboarding notes point at a missing path. Verify the current owner and repair only that stale navigation entry from source truth; do not judge unrelated changes.
The product brief is approved. Turn it into ordered implementation tasks with owners, dependencies, acceptance checks, and stop conditions before anyone edits code.
We want a large data migration next quarter. Outline work packages and validation milestones, but do not investigate today's failure or touch source files.
Nightly imports now take forty minutes. Reproduce the slowdown under a controlled fixture, test competing hypotheses, and prove the regression seam before proposing a fix.
A confirmed failing test points to one function. Explain the root cause and the evidence that supports it, but leave the source unchanged for a later implementation pass.
Assess the current dirty worktree for mixed ownership and commit readiness, give exact staging groups, and keep both files and Git state unchanged.
Review an immutable release candidate across contracts, tests, documentation, and security, then return ranked blockers only without editing anything.
The review is complete. Stage only src/account.ts and its focused test, show the cached diff, make the requested commit, and verify the branch and remote refs.
Synchronize this reviewed branch to origin after checking whether it is ahead, behind, or diverged; preserve unapproved files and never force-push.
Implement the approved Rust parser change, preserve its public API, add regression tests, run focused checks, and stop before any staging or commit.
The cause is confirmed in an asynchronous handler. Apply the bounded source fix and verify cancellation behavior, leaving all Git operations to someone else.
Build the approved settings panel with the existing UI system, wire its state and API contracts, test responsive keyboard behavior, and do not commit.
A review already identified a focus trap in one dialog. Correct the source and run browser-facing checks, but do not operate a live page or change Git state.
Read only the selected Tokio service for task ownership, cancellation, shutdown, and error propagation; return evidence-ranked findings and validation gaps without changing code.
Profile one selected memory-heavy Rust path against a representative workload and critique the measurement design, without applying an optimization.
Read only the selected Vue screen for ownership and reuse, state and data contracts, keyboard focus, and rendering cost; list the profiles examined and excluded.
Inspect only this React component's layout tokens and responsive behavior for duplication; do not modify it or review unrelated repository changes.
Perform a scoped read-only assessment of the OAuth callback and its configuration for authorization, token leakage, logging, and privacy risks; stay within the listed files.
Check the known file-upload endpoint for traversal, content validation, secret exposure, and permission bypasses, without expanding into a broad repository scan.
In the built-in browser, open the specified staging URL, verify the target and session, inspect desktop and mobile screenshots plus console and network evidence, and do not submit anything.
The CORS failure is already isolated to the browser layer. Reproduce it on the verified page and capture request and response facts only.
Launch the specified desktop binary, verify its process, window, and runtime source, exercise semantic controls, and capture the requested evidence without editing the repository.
The accessibility issue is already isolated to the desktop client. Reproduce it on the verified window and return screenshots and automation evidence, without changing source.
Prepare a self-contained external review packet from this fixed commit range, including its manifest, hashes, and review prompt, then stop before opening a browser or sending it.
A package is ready. With explicit authorization, conduct exactly one external review round, capture the response, and verify findings locally without applying fixes or starting another round.
Rewrite this supplied Chinese post in a direct personal voice while preserving every metric, caveat, link, attribution, and disclosure; add no new claims.
Explain why this supplied Chinese copy sounds synthetic, then tighten it while keeping every fact, source boundary, and uncertainty unchanged.
